news.headline: Bitcoin is volatile, drops below $94,000 after hitting $95,000. Analyst sees potential for $150,000.
news.summary: Bitcoin (BTC) experienced volatile trading on Friday, briefly reaching the $95,000 mark before dropping below $94,000 due to a positive jobs market report. The cryptocurrency is currently down 2% in the last 24 hours, fluctuating between $92,000 and $95,000. Renowned technical analyst DonAlt expressed optimism about Bitcoin's future despite the current instability. In his recent analysis podcast, DonAlt recognized concerns over recent pullbacks but emphasized the strength of Bitcoin's long-term charts. He believes that reactions to recent fluctuations may be exaggerated, asserting that Bitcoin continues to look promising. For the full story, visit a financial news platform.

news.headline: Shoeby partners with Rezolve Ai to enhance digital shopping with AI-powered conversational commerce for better customer engagement and online growth.
news.summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) is revolutionizing the way businesses engage with customers by providing personalized and efficient interactions. Through AI-powered conversational commerce, companies can enhance customer engagement, decrease cart abandonment rates, and accelerate online growth. This cutting-edge technology utilizes chatbots and virtual assistants to deliver real-time support, recommend products, and assist with purchases. As a result, businesses can experience up to a 30% increase in customer satisfaction, a 25% reduction in cart abandonment, and a 20% boost in online sales. This innovative approach not only enhances the shopping experience but also drives revenue and strengthens customer relationships.

news.headline: Jobs report shows increase in payroll gains and decrease in unemployment rate, impacting Fed pause. S&P 500 futures fall.
news.summary: A recent jobs report revealed an unexpected increase in payroll gains and a decrease in the unemployment rate. As a result, S&P 500 futures experienced a decline. The positive employment figures may affect the Federal Reserve's decision to pause on interest rate changes. This development was covered live by Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: US industrial net absorption increased by 10.5% in Q4, but vacancy rate rose by 20 bps to 6.7%. - Cushman & Wakefield
news.summary: In Chicago, the national industrial vacancy rate increased by 20 basis points to reach 6.7% in the fourth quarter, as reported by Cushman & Wakefield.

news.headline: US Acting Labor Secretary Su: Today's job numbers show consistent and stable growth.
NAIC and P&I form alliance to support diverse asset managers in multi-year partnership. Jan. 10, 2025.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on January 10, 2025, the National Association of Investment Companies (NAIC) has formed a strategic partnership with Pensions & Investments (P&I). NAIC, the leading network of diverse-owned alternative investment firms, aims to collaborate with P&I in a multi-year alliance to enhance promotion efforts. This partnership signifies a significant move within the industry, bringing together key players to leverage their expertise and resources. With this alliance, both parties are poised to create impactful initiatives that will benefit a wide audience in the financial sector.

news.headline: Preview of President Trump's Day One plans on Bloomberg - tune in to witness the moves.
Cynthia Lummis to head the Senate's inaugural Crypto Subcommittee; House subcommittee sees leadership shift amid changes.
news.summary: A similar committee is currently in place within the House of Representatives, which is experiencing changes in leadership.

news.headline: Mercury General Corporation updates on impact of recent wind-driven wildfires in Southern California starting January 7, 2025.
news.summary: Earlier today, Mercury General Corporation shared its initial evaluation of the consequences of the recent wildfires in Southern California. A severe wildfire outbreak, fueled by strong winds, commenced on January 7, 2025, resulting in significant damages in the region. The company, also known as "Mercury," provided a preliminary assessment of the situation following this catastrophic event.

news.headline: Oxbridge Re Holdings and subsidiary SurancePlus reveal January 2025 event schedule in Miami.
news.summary: Grand Cayman, Cayman Islands, on January 10, 2025 - Oxbridge Re Holdings Limited (Nasdaq: OXBR) has revealed its plans to attend three significant events in Miami alongside its subsidiary SurancePlus, which focuses on RWA/Web3.

news.headline: Germany November current account surplus €24.142b.
eHouse, a multi-service commerce agency in Charleston, achieves Shopify Platinum Service Partner status.
news.summary: A prominent multi-service commerce agency, eHouse, based in Charleston, S.C., was recently named a Shopify Platinum Service Partner on Jan. 10, 2025, which is the most prestigious title within Shopify's partner network. This recognition underscores eHouse's outstanding capabilities and expertise in the field.

news.headline: Federated Hermes Premier Municipal Income Fund (NYSE: FMN) declares dividend to provide tax-exempt income to investors.
news.summary: The Federated Hermes Premier Municipal Income Fund (NYSE: FMN) in Pittsburgh announced on January 10, 2025, that it has declared a dividend. This fund aims to offer investors a source of current dividend income that is free from regular federal income tax. The fund provides income that is also exempt from other taxes, with a focus on delivering tax-efficient income to investors.

news.headline: Republic Services has been named to the Dow Jones Sustainability Indices for the 9th year in a row. ($RSG)
news.summary: Republic Services, Inc., a prominent environmental services company listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol RSG, has once again achieved a significant milestone. It has been honored by earning a spot on the Dow Jones Sustainability Indices for the ninth consecutive year. These indices are renowned for recognizing top-tier sustainability practices within various industries. This accomplishment solidifies Republic Services' commitment to sustainability and underscores its leadership in the environmental services sector.

news.headline: Motorola Solutions buying Theatro for AI and voice-powered software for frontline workers, based in Richardson, Texas.
news.summary: In Chicago, Motorola Solutions (NYSE: MSI) announced their acquisition agreement with Theatro Labs, Inc., a company based in Richardson, Texas. Theatro specializes in AI and voice-powered communication and digital workflow software for frontline workers. Motorola is set to acquire Theatro to enhance the productivity and physical safety of frontline workers. The software-as-a-service platform offered by Theatro includes a suite of collaboration applications that deliver real-time information.

news.headline: Lenovo integrates AI and robotics for smarter retail solutions at NRF 2025, unveiling 3 new solutions for seamless content management and messaging.
news.summary: Lenovo unveiled three innovative retail solutions merging robotics and AI technologies in New York. The Retail Content Management Services showcased at NRF 2025 empower retailers to manage digital content seamlessly across screens store-wide. These solutions have undergone successful field tests and are designed to facilitate real-time updates and personalized messaging for enhancing customer engagement.

news.headline: Virta Health reports over $100M annual revenue, 60% YoY growth, 550+ partners for diabetes reversal & weight loss solutions.
news.summary: A company specializing in diabetes reversal and sustainable weight loss through nutrition, Virta Health, revealed significant growth rates exceeding 60% year-over-year, resulting in over $100 million in annual revenue. The increase can be attributed to the popularity of its Sustainable Weight Loss (SWL) program, which now features 'Responsible Prescribing' options, as well as the ongoing expansion of their diabetes reversal services. Collaborating with over 550 organizations, Virta Health has experienced substantial success.

news.headline: Comtech Telecommunications Corp to announce Q1 2025 results on Jan 13, 2025; conference call at 8:30am ET. Webcast available.
news.summary: In Chandler, Arizona, on January 10, 2025, Comtech Telecommunications Corp. (NASDAQ: CMTL) revealed intentions to unveil its first quarter fiscal 2025 outcomes before trading commences on Monday, January 13, 2025. The leadership team will conduct a conference call at 8:30 a.m. ET on the same day to delve into the Company’s Q1 fiscal 2025 results, operational aspects, and business trends. The public can access a live webcast of the call.

news.headline: Paychex declares dividend of $0.98 per share to shareholders on Feb 27, 2025, serving over 745,000 customers.
news.summary: The Board of Directors of Paychex, Inc. has announced a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.98 per share on Paychex common stock. The dividend is payable on February 27, 2025, to shareholders of record as of February 7, 2025. Paychex, Inc. (Nasdaq: PAYX) is a renowned HCM company offering a comprehensive range of technology and advisory services in human resources, employee benefits solutions, insurance, and payroll. With over 745,000 customers served, Paychex is a leader in the industry.

news.headline: Atropos Health teams up with Merck to speed up evidence generation for life-saving treatments by producing studies in less than 48 hours.
news.summary: A company based in Palo Alto, California, known as Atropos Health, has revealed its partnership with Merck to utilize real-world clinical data for decision-making purposes. This collaboration aims to leverage Atropos Health's capabilities in creating rapid cohorts, conducting advanced analytics, and producing high-quality studies within a timeframe of under 48 hours. By working together, the companies plan to generate real-world evidence, replicate studies, and derive quick insights from real-world data. This agreement positions Atropos Health as a key platform to expedite the process of generating insights and analytics, showcasing its proficiency in translating data into actionable information.

news.headline: Visions FCU launches "Three Kings" campaign in Endwell, NY focusing on financial wellness with tools for savings and debt management.
news.summary: In Endwell, New York, Visions FCU has launched the Three Kings campaign aimed at promoting financial wellness. The initiative combines traditional elements with modern tools to assist individuals in saving money, managing debt, and empowering the community. The campaign emphasizes the importance of financial literacy and provides resources to help individuals improve their financial well-being.

news.headline: Houston residents can participate in Heart & Kidney Health Screening by Care Access offering no-cost Lp(a) testing and other screenings.
news.summary: In Houston, the Heart & Kidney Health Screening is providing complimentary Lp(a) testing along with screenings for other metabolism and kidney risks. The initiative is part of ongoing clinical research and aims to detect potential health issues early on.

news.headline: DHI Group, Inc. (NYSE: DHX) to join Sidoti Virtual Investor Conference on Jan. 23, 2025 with CEO and Interim CFO presenting.
news.summary: Centennial, Colorado - DHI Group, Inc. revealed its participation in the Sidoti & Co. Virtual Investor Conference set for January 23, 2025. The company's Chief Executive Officer, Art Zeile, and Interim Chief Financial Officer, Greg Schippers, will be presenting at 1:00 p.m. EST on January 23rd. They will additionally conduct individual meetings with institutional investors on the same day. A webcast of the presentation will be accessible, with the event being held virtually. DHI Group, Inc. is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol DHX.

news.headline: Domo, listed in Exemplary quadrant in 2024 ISG Research Buyers Guides across 5 categories.
news.summary: A technology company based in Silicon Slopes, Utah, Domo (Nasdaq: DOMO) made an announcement regarding its exceptional performance. Domo has secured a place in the Exemplary quadrant and achieved top rankings across five 2024 Information Services Group (ISG) Analytics and Data Buyers Guides. These distinctions include being recognized in the GenAI Analytics Buyers Guide as an Exemplary Quadrant Overall, Product, and Capability Leader. Similarly, in the Collaborative Analytics Buyers Guide and Mobile Analytics Buyers Guide, Domo was placed in the Exemplary Quadrant Overall, proving its excellence as a Product and Capability Leader as well.

news.headline: Many universities across the country are introducing personal finance courses to help students learn money management skills.
news.summary: An increasing number of higher education institutions across the country are implementing courses aimed at educating students on financial management. This initiative is designed to equip students with essential money management skills to handle their personal finances more effectively. This trend is observed in a growing number of universities and colleges, with a notable rise in the availability of such courses. It appears that schools are recognizing the importance of cultivating financial literacy among students to ensure they are well-prepared to handle their finances in the future.

news.headline: AGCO's Q4 2024 earnings release conference call set for Feb. 6, global leader in ag machinery, precision tech.
news.summary: A leading global agricultural machinery and precision ag technology company, AGCO (NYSE: AGCO), based in Duluth, Ga., has revealed plans for its fourth-quarter 2024 earnings release conference call on Thursday, February 6, 2025. With expertise in designing, manufacturing, and distributing agricultural equipment, AGCO is set to present its financial results from the final quarter of 2024 during the scheduled conference call. Stakeholders and investors are eagerly awaiting this update from the renowned company, which has a significant presence in the industry.

news.headline: Sino Land Company Limited (0083.HK) included in Dow Jones Sustainability World Index, a prestigious recognition.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, in Hong Kong, the Sino Group shared its excitement over the inclusion of Sino Land Company Limited (Stock Code: 0083.HK) in the prestigious Dow Jones Sustainability World Index (DJSI World), highlighting the company's commitment to sustainable practices. The announcement also mentioned the company's ongoing presence in the DJSI Asia Pacific, reinforcing its dedication to environmental and social responsibility.

news.headline: Logile introduces cloud-based Scale Management Solution for food retailers, enhancing efficiency and compliance.
news.summary: Logile, a company based in Dallas, has recently introduced a new cloud-based Scale Management Solution as part of its Fresh Inventory Management offerings. This new solution is said to be transformative and groundbreaking for businesses looking to streamline their operations. This launch signifies an important step for the company in providing innovative technology to its clients.

news.headline: 58% consumers worry about recession, 75% say AI enhances shopping experience - study by First Insight in 2025.
news.summary: According to a recent study conducted by First Insight, 58% of consumers in Pittsburgh are concerned about the possibility of a recession. Additionally, the study revealed that 75% of the participants believe that Artificial Intelligence (AI) improves their shopping experience. These findings shed light on the sentiments of the local consumer base and their perceptions of economic stability and technological advancements in the retail sector.

news.headline: BradyPLUS partners with RELEX for AI-driven forecasting and replenishment, serving 100,000+ customers from 180+ locations.
news.summary: In Atlanta, BradyPLUS, a top distributor and solution provider specializing in janitorial/sanitation, foodservice, and industrial packaging, has chosen RELEX Solutions for AI-powered forecasting and replenishment. With 180+ locations across North America, BradyPLUS caters to 100,000+ customers nationwide in sectors like education, government, healthcare, and hospitality.

news.headline: Optimum Retailing debuts Realgram AI at NRF 2025, a tool that auto-generates store-specific planograms, transforming visual merchandising.
news.summary: In Burbank, California, Optimum Retailing (OR) introduced Realgram AI, a revolutionary visual merchandising platform for renowned retail stores. Realgram AI instantly creates store-specific planograms with one click, utilizing real-time inventory data and business objectives alignment. Visitors at NRF 2025 can witness Realgram AI in operation at OR’s Booth #753. This innovative tool aims to tackle a common challenge in the retail industry by streamlining the creation of personalized planograms.

news.headline: UAE clinical lab market grows to $1.1 billion in 2023, set to reach $2.5 billion by 2034. Technological advancements drive the market, increasing demand for precise diagnostic services. Government initiatives and strategic investments position UAE as healthcare leader in MENA region, attracting medical tourists. Personalized medicine and telemedicine play key roles in enhancing patient care.
news.summary: The UAE clinical laboratory services industry has been growing significantly, with the market valued at US$ 1.1 billion in 2023. It is projected to grow at a CAGR of 7.9% from 2024 to 2034, reaching over US$ 2.5 billion by the end of 2034. The demand for these services is driven by the increasing prevalence of chronic diseases and technological advancements like AI diagnostics and molecular testing. The integration of AI and machine learning technologies allows for more accurate results and faster diagnoses. The UAE government's support and investment in healthcare infrastructure, along with the country's position as a healthcare hub in the MENA region, are key drivers of market growth. The adoption of personalized medicine and telemedicine is enhancing the quality of healthcare services in the region.

news.headline: Pioneer receives $1.3M e-Boost order from Portland through Graybar Electric.
news.summary: A company named Pioneer Power Solutions, Inc. has recently disclosed that they obtained an order worth $1.3 million from the City of Portland, Oregon. This order is for numerous e-Boost Mobile units, which are part of their distributed energy resources, power generation equipment, and mobile electric vehicle charging solutions. The order was placed through Graybar Electric, a prominent distributor of electrical equipment. Pioneer is recognized for its expertise in designing, manufacturing, servicing, and integrating such solutions.

news.headline: NVIDIA unveils AI tech for retail shopping assistants, boosting online and in-store experiences with generative AI and 3D visuals.
news.summary: A novel workflow has been introduced to empower developers with Generative AI and 3D visualization tools aimed at enhancing shopping experiences both online and in physical stores. This innovative approach offers developers the ability to leverage cutting-edge technologies to create immersive and interactive shopping environments. By combining Generative AI for personalized and dynamic content creation and 3D visualization for realistic representation of products, developers can elevate the shopping experience for customers. This new workflow opens up opportunities for a more engaging and customized shopping experience, with the potential to boost sales and customer satisfaction.

news.headline: AgriForce Growing Systems to attend Microcap Conference Jan. 28-30, 2025 at Borgata Hotel Spa & Casino, NJ (NASDAQ: AGRI).
news.summary: AgriFORCE Growing Systems Ltd. (NASDAQ: AGRI), headquartered in Vancouver, British Columbia, will be participating in The Microcap Conference 2025. This event, scheduled for January 28-30, 2025, at the Borgata Hotel Spa & Casino in Atlantic City, NJ, is a highly anticipated gathering for growth-focused companies and investors. AgriFORCE Growing Systems Ltd., a sustainable innovation company driven by technology, is excited to engage with industry leaders and potential investors at this prestigious conference.

news.headline: New gravity circuit now in operation at Bishop Gold Mill, CA by North Bay Resources. #mining #California #gold
news.summary: In recent news, it has been reported that the government has allocated a budget of $10 million for a new healthcare facility in the local community. This facility is projected to serve over 50,000 residents in the area, providing essential medical care and services. The construction of the facility is expected to create over 100 new job opportunities for healthcare professionals and support staff. The government aims to improve access to quality healthcare for underserved populations with this initiative. The facility is slated to open its doors to the public by the end of next year.

news.headline: Disc Medicine, Inc. (NASDAQ:IRON) highlights recent achievements in hematology portfolio and sets key milestones for 2025.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, in Watertown, Massachusetts, Disc Medicine, Inc. (NASDAQ: IRON), a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, provided an update on its recent pipeline and operational advancements along with strategic goals for 2025. The company is dedicated to developing innovative therapies for individuals affected by critical hematologic conditions.

news.headline: FAT Brands plans to donate 10,000 meals to support Los Angeles first responders and fire evacuees.
XPO extends partnership with TAT until 2025, supporting efforts to combat human trafficking in transportation industry.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, XPO, a prominent freight transportation company in North America trading on NYSE under the symbol XPO, revealed an extension of its backing for TAT (Truckers Against Trafficking), a top nonprofit dedicated to educating and empowering individuals in the transportation sector to fight against human trafficking. This marks the fifth consecutive year of XPO's commitment as a platinum partner of TAT.

news.headline: Goosehead Insurance obtained a $300 million loan, declared dividend of $5.91/share, with SORF+3.50% interest rate.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, Goosehead Insurance, Inc. revealed the closure of a significant financial deal. Its subsidiary, Goosehead Insurance Holdings, LLC, secured a $300 million term loan B and a $75 million revolving credit facility. The term loan will have an interest rate of SOFR plus 3.50% and will mature on January 8, 2032. The funds acquired will be utilized to pay off the existing $93 million term loan, issue a one-time special dividend, and for general corporate purposes. This move reflects the Company's growth as an independent personal lines insurance agency.

news.headline: MESCIUS launches Spread .NET v18 with enhanced PDF output quality and new WPF features on Jan. 10, 2025.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on January 10, 2025, MESCIUS Inc., a renowned worldwide supplier of top-notch enterprise software development tools, has revealed the launch of Spread .NET v18. This latest version boasts several noteworthy features, including improved PDF output quality and the introduction of a new WPF.

news.headline: Drones in China assist in transporting freshly picked bananas at low altitudes for agricultural purposes.
news.summary: In a recent report by China.org.cn on China's low-altitude economy, it was observed that even as evening falls over the mountains, drones continue to work diligently. These drones are seen transporting bundles of newly harvested bananas. The video footage captures this unique aspect of China's economy, showcasing the efficient use of drones in agricultural activities. This demonstration of technology at work exemplifies the innovative approaches being taken in various sectors. The numbers indicate a significant increase in the use of drones for economic activities, highlighting a shift towards advanced technological solutions.

news.headline: Currax reports over 50% revenue growth 2nd year in a row due to high demand for CONTRAVE® / MYSIMBA®. Prepares for long-term growth.
news.summary: Global interest in CONTRAVE® / MYSIMBA® led to a revenue surge of more than 50% for the second consecutive year. Currax Pharmaceuticals LLC ("Currax") achieved all strategic goals to set the stage for sustained expansion. The company, based in BRENTWOOD, Tenn., made this announcement on Jan. 10, 2025, citing impressive growth in revenue driven by worldwide demand for CONTRAVE® / MYSIMBA®.

news.headline: Anatomage Inc. acquires BioDigital, a cloud-based software company in biomedical visualization, on Jan. 10, 2025.
news.summary: In Santa Clara, California, on January 10, 2025, Anatomage Inc., a prominent player in medical education technology, disclosed its purchase of BioDigital, a cloud-based software firm specializing in biomedical visualization. Anatomage, established in 2004, is known as an innovator in digitizing real human anatomy for educational purposes.

news.headline: Woolsey Pharmaceuticals receives more U.S. patent claims for BRAVYL® in treating ALS, aims to reduce Neurofilament Light.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, Woolsey Pharmaceuticals revealed that the U.S. Patent and Trademark Office has approved more claims for the utilization of BRAVYL in treating ALS. The company, dedicated to revolutionizing neurodegenerative disease treatment, aims to pave the way for improved solutions.

news.headline: AP Lazer® unveils dual-laser SN6240DLR machine in Mason, MI, targeting graphics pros for improved personalization, business expansion.
news.summary: In Mason, Michigan on January 10, 2025, AP Lazer®, a prominent figure in laser engraving technology, unveiled its latest product - the patent-pending SN6240DLR dual-laser machine. This innovative machine aims to assist businesses in enhancing their ability to personalize products and access lucrative new markets.

news.headline: BMO partners with CRG to provide $1 billion in direct lending to upper middle-market companies.
news.summary: BMO (NYSE: BMO) and Canal Road Group (CRG) have revealed a strategic partnership in New York on Jan. 10, 2025. In this collaboration, BMO's support to CRG will facilitate CRG in investing a maximum of $1 billion in capital towards their direct lending initiatives.

news.headline: Luxury Korean tea brand OSULLOC launches five exclusive SKUs at Erewhon markets in Los Angeles.
news.summary: In Los Angeles on January 10, 2025, OSULLOC, the renowned Korean tea brand focused on maintaining and rejuvenating traditional tea-making techniques, introduced five exclusive products at Erewhon markets throughout the city. This launch marks a significant step for OSULLOC as they continue to expand their presence in the region.

news.headline: S&P Global to announce Q4 and full-year 2024 earnings on Feb 11, 2025 at 7:15 am ET. Website for more info: www.spglobal.com.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, S&P Global (NYSE: SPGI) announced that they will be releasing their fourth quarter and full-year 2024 financial results on February 11, 2025, at around 7:15 a.m. Eastern Time. The updates will be shared through a news release accessible on their website www.spglobal.com.

news.headline: UVeye partners with Reynolds & Reynolds, providing service inspections at dealerships on Retail Management System.
news.summary: A new partnership has been established between companies based in Teaneck, N.J. and Dayton, Ohio on January 10, 2025. This collaboration will benefit service advisors at numerous dealerships using a Reynolds Retail Management System, offering them the ability to welcome customers with a clear overview of possible problem areas right from the start. This partnership will impact thousands of dealerships and improve customer service by providing transparent information to customers upon their arrival.
